text.message: Its not really how nb work

i havent done anything in like 4 rounds
oj has city and devs and open settles
like green and I are definetly in last
green -- I offered the same trade :(
Shouldn't we be working together here? Red gets road we are in last...
i think oj is still ahead with the 8 blocked
and i dont have a lot of space
but your def ahead of me
Dude, youve rhe one who hasn't been stealing blocking green
ill trade green if its a good trade, its my only chance
Not blocking green is a crime
